description: HighRadius is a financial technology company that provides automated accounts receivable, accounts payable, and treasury management solutions.
vision_statement: To be the leading provider of cloud-based financial automation and analytics solutions for businesses worldwide.
mission_statement: Empowering businesses to automate and optimize their financial operations, enabling them to focus on growth and innovation.

core_values.innovation: Driving innovation in financial automation and analytics.
core_values.customer_centricity: Putting customers at the heart of everything we do.
core_values.integrity: Maintaining the highest standards of ethics and integrity.
core_values.collaboration: Fostering a culture of collaboration and teamwork.
core_values.growth: Fostering a culture of continuous learning and growth.

sales_motion: HighRadius offers a cloud-based financial automation and analytics platform that helps businesses automate and optimize their financial operations, including accounts receivable, accounts payable, and cash management.
customer_lifetime_value: Varies by customer, but on average, HighRadius customers can expect to save $1 million to $5 million per year.
cac_ltv_ratio: Varies by customer, but on average, HighRadius customers can expect a CAC/LTV ratio of 1:5 to 1:10.
customer_concentration_risk: Low, with a diverse customer base across various industries.
exit_strategy_history: HighRadius has a strong track record of successful exits, including a $1.8 billion acquisition by Thoma Bravo in 2020.
carbon_footprint: HighRadius has set a goal to be carbon neutral by 2025 and has implemented various sustainability initiatives to reduce its carbon footprint.
ethical_sourcing: HighRadius sources its products and services from suppliers who adhere to high standards of ethics and sustainability.
benchmark_vs_peers: HighRadius consistently ranks among the top performers in its industry, with a strong track record of innovation and customer satisfaction.
industry_associations: HighRadius is a member of various industry associations, including the Financial Technology Association and the National Association of Software and Service Companies.
case_studies: HighRadius has a comprehensive library of case studies showcasing its success with various customers, including Fortune 500 companies.
company_maturity: HighRadius is a mature company with a strong track record of innovation and customer satisfaction.
client_quality: HighRadius has a strong reputation for delivering high-quality solutions and services to its customers.
sustainability_csr: HighRadius has a comprehensive sustainability and corporate social responsibility program in place, with a focus on reducing its carbon footprint and promoting diversity and inclusion.
crisis_behavior: HighRadius has a strong track record of responding effectively to crises, including a 2020 ransomware attack that was quickly contained and resolved.
